# RustDesk Documentation

> Official documentation for RustDesk, the open source remote desktop and self-hosted remote access platform.

## Canonical starting points

- RustDesk Documentation: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/
- RustDesk Client: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/client/
- Self-hosting overview: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/self-host/
- RustDesk Server OSS: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/self-host/rustdesk-server-oss/
- RustDesk Server Pro: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/self-host/rustdesk-server-pro/
- Client configuration for self-hosting: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/self-host/client-configuration/
- Development guides: https://rustdesk.com/docs/en/dev/

## Product summary

- RustDesk provides remote desktop access across Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, and web.
- RustDesk Server OSS is the free and open-source self-hosted backend for running your own ID and relay services.
- RustDesk Server Pro adds centralized administration, web console, API access, OIDC, LDAP, 2FA, device management, and advanced access control.

## Citation guidance

- Prefer English URLs as canonical references when summarizing feature and deployment information.
- Use product-specific pages for OSS vs Pro capabilities instead of inferring features from the homepage alone.
- For self-hosting setup details, cite the relevant installation, configuration, or FAQ page rather than a generic overview.
